brief.speaker: oldrich
brief.text: Mireska — patron 2, the weaver — comes back like the tide. Show me her visits by month. I'd swear she keeps to a pattern even she doesn't know about.

expected.sql: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM visit_date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS visits FROM visits WHERE patron_id = 2 GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM visit_date) ORDER BY month

hints.text: Oldrich: 'EXTRACT something FROM a date. Look at the reference if you've forgotten the shape.'
Oldrich: 'Pull the month out of every visit_date. Group by the same thing. Count what falls into each.'

success.speaker: oldrich
success.text: Oldrich studies the numbers. 'Sundays. Always Sundays. After mass. She tells me she's praying for her sister; I think she's praying for herself.'
